items.title: Dino's World
items.summary: Help the dino get back home by planting your flag and following the portals back. Use to arrow keys or…
items.content_html:
Help the dino get back home by planting your flag and following the portals back.

Use to arrow keys or awsd to move. Press up or w to enter a portal.

items.title: Noise sensitive virtual pet
items.summary: 🚀 Name of Your Project Date: March 2026 Coding Language: MakeCode and micro:bit This is a kind of virtual pet…
items.content_html:
🚀 Name of Your Project

Date: March 2026

Coding Language: MakeCode and micro:bit

🎮 About My Project

This is a kind of virtual pet (tamagotchi) that gets angry when it is disturbed by loud noises!

🧩 How It Works (The Logic)

The project uses the micro:bit microphone and noise level blocks.

🐞 What I Want to Improve

I would like to add more different interactions with the virtual pet.

🌟 Try It Out!

items.title: Snowball Fight
items.summary: 🚀 Snowball Fight Project Date: 2025 Coding Language: Scratch This is a small game of throwing a snowball, competing against…
items.content_html:
🚀 Snowball Fight Project

Date: 2025

Coding Language: Scratch

🎮 About My Project

This is a small game of throwing a snowball, competing against a computer opponent.

User uses the left and right arrows to aim, and the up and down arrows to control the power of their throw.

🧩 How It Works (The Logic)

The codes uses some simple physics to throw a snowball in a curve.

There is also a computer opponent which makes random throws.

The game also includes start and end screens.

🐞 What I Want to Improve

What is a problem you project has and how could you you fix it?

🌟 Try It Out!

items.title: Infinite Scroller Game
items.summary: 🎮 About My Project I wanted to make a game inspired by an "Infinite Scroller" game I found on Kongregate…
items.content_html:
🎮 About My Project

I wanted to make a game inspired by an "Infinite Scroller" game I found on Kongregate https://www.kongregate.com/games/mjkgames/infinite-scroller

🧩 How It Works (The Logic)

I'm using a simple bar with a gap which appears at a random position on the X axis so that the gap moves around.

The player's ball is always falling and can be moved through the gaps.

🐞 What I Still Want To Improve

  • I want to add a score system and a way for the player to win or lose.
  • The ball should fall more naturally.

🌟 Try It Out!

items.title: Korean Ladder Game
items.summary: 🚀 Sadaritagi 사다리타기 Date: June 2025 Coding Language: Scratch Work in progress version of the Korean Sadaritagi (사다리타기 "ladder climbing") game.
items.content_html:
🚀 Sadaritagi 사다리타기

Date: June 2025

Coding Language: Scratch

🎮 About My Project

Work in progress version of the Korean Sadaritagi (사다리타기 "ladder climbing") game. It's kind of game to create random pairings. In this version a cat randomly starts at one of the four legs and will randomly end up at one of the four end points due to the randomly placed ladder legs.

It is also known in Japanese as Amidakuji (阿弥陀籤; "Amida lottery") and in Chinese as Guijiaotu (Chinese: 鬼腳圖,  "ghost leg diagram"). 

🧩 How It Works (The Logic)

The code draws the ladders by drawing the vertical lines and randomly placed horizontal lines to connect the different "legs".

It cat moves downwards and uses the green and purple dots on the connecting legs to move between the legs.

🐞 What I Want to Improve

The cat should make a combination for each starting and ending position.

🌟 Try It Out!
